location: Random drop (4% chance) from Redmane Knights across Caelid. A reliable target is the horseback knight northwest of the Impassable Greatbridge Site of Grace — follow the cliff edge past the sword monument, drop down a small ledge, then continue west.
tactics: The horseback knight near Impassable Greatbridge charges and jousts aggressively — knocking it off its mount or baiting the charge into an obstacle can make the fight safer.
Redmane Knights appear in multiple spots across Caelid, so any of them can drop the shield if this particular one doesn't cooperate.
Caelid's rot swamps nearby can inflict Scarlet Rot buildup — stay alert to your surroundings while farming.
lore: A fang-shaped greatshield bearing the crest of a red-maned lion, carried by the Redmane Knights who rode to war at General Radahn's side.

builds.name: Fire-resistant turtle
builds.why: 70% fire negation is unusually high for a greatshield, useful against Caelid's fire-heavy enemies and fire-attuned bosses.

builds.name: Guard-counter poke build
builds.why: Balanced negation and a lighter-than-average weight (14.0) support a mobile block-and-counter playstyle.
